# EDDN live schema snapshot

These unmodified test fixtures come from the official
[`EDCD/EDDN`](https://github.com/EDCD/EDDN) `live` branch at commit
`4ad669bb7bbe1eae080e4c354e786dca4db91f35` (2026-06-17).

They are used only for offline contract tests. The upstream BSD 3-Clause
license is included in this directory as `LICENSE`.
